privileged_info_summary: The task configures a gradebook in OpenSIS (open-source student information system) for the course 'General Science'. All metadata values are verified: the task creates an assignment category named 'Projects', creates an assignment titled 'Science Fair Project' with 150 points due on 2025-06-01, and verifies proper database linkage between the assignment and category. Data is entirely synthetic, created within the task setup scripts. All five metadata fields are consistent across setup, export, and verification code.
